string.text: Escort the Scientists
Scientists have hired you to guide them to a specific location for study. Once their research has been successfully conducted, return them safely to camp.
%c[ui_8]We require an experienced stalker to escort our colleagues to the field site and ensure their safety during the measurements. Would you be able to assist us?
Thank you for your protection, stalker. Please, take this as a token of our gratitude.
Find the %s rare Artefact for Scientists
You have been asked to retrieve the %s artefact. Bring it back to Tukarev if you happen to get your hands on one.
We are looking for certain kinds of artefacts. If you are interested, I will tell you what we need.
%c[ui_8]I need you to bring us back an artefact %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8]. You ever heard of it? We have something we can give you in return that I think you will find useful.
Great! You've found exactly what we are looking for. Thanks, stalker, here's the promised reward.
Find %s for Scientists
Garin needs a tissue sample from a %s.
The scientists need an experienced mutant hunter for a case. Can I count on you?

%c[ui_8]Our scientists are looking for certain mutant tissue samples for research, specifically... %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8]. It is crucial that the sample is fresh. Therefore, return with the material as soon as possible.
Great samples, just what I needed. Thanks, stalker, here's the promised reward.
Find the %s rare Artefact for Ozersky
Ozersky has asked you to find a rare artefact called the %s.
Для исследований не нужен очень редкий артефакт. Вы возьмётесь за эту работу?

%c[ui_8]Listen, young man, I need a rare artifact that has no harmful properties. It’s called the %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8]. I’m sure a stalker with your experience and knowledge of the Zone can handle it. Are you ready to help science?
You found the artifact? Incredible! Here’s your reward.
Hunt Bounty Hunter for Yar
Yar needs a bounty taken off his head.
%c[ui_8]Mercenaries has put a price on my head. Not the first time though... I figured out who took the bounty and need someone who let him to get lost in the Zone. Can you help me?
Thank you stalker! Here is your payment.
Eliminate Mutants for Trapper

Mutants have been spotted near this location making the area dangerous for some of the locals. You have been tasked to eliminate the mutant threat within the area. Report back to Trapper after the job is done.

%c[ui_8]I've been looking for someone to help keep the area around Yanov a bit safer by depopulating the various mutant lairs found in area. Would you like the job?\n\n%c[ui_orange][This task will fail if after taking it, the player goes to a location where this task is not available]
Thank you, stalker. The area will be much safer for others because of you. Here is your payment.
Collect %s for Trapper
Trapper says he will pay well if I can bring him a %s.
I have a bounty out on a particular type of mutant. Are you interested?
%c[ui_8]Kill this mutant and bring me its %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8] and I will pay you well, stalker.
Ah, another threat eliminated and a new decoration for the camp. Well done, stalker.
Find %s for Trapper
Trapper is looking for a specific firearm in good condition. Return to him if you find one.
One of my trappers is in the market for a specific firearm that I don't have available. Would you be able to track one down for me?
%c[ui_8]I need a %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8]. The trapper who wants it goes after dangerous game so he needs it to be in good condition. I can pay you well if you find one.
Ah, perfect. This will do nicely. Here is the money I promised you.
Find %s for Nitro
%s are required by Nitro to install basic equipment upgrades, you should bring them back to him if you find any.
I need new tools, stalker, something that is hard to come by in the Zone. If you are interested in helping me out, I will tell you what I need.
%c[ui_8]I need a set of %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8]. It should contain what I need. If you can bring some back for me I will be grateful, I will even offer you a discount from here on out.
Perfect! This is just what I need, stalker. If you need any of your equipment fine-tuned, now I can do it properly.
Find %s for Nitro
%s are required by Nitro to install advanced equipment upgrades, you should bring them back to him if you find any.
The toolkit you brought me is great, but it doesn't have everything I need. Do you think you can find me a better set?
%c[ui_8]I need an %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8]. I'm not sure where you can get one of these, but if you can find one, I need it.
Whoa! You found a nice set of tools for me. Here, I promised you some money in return.
Find %s for Nitro
%s are required by Nitro to install expert equipment upgrades, you should bring them back to him if you find any.
The toolkit you brought me is great, but it doesn't have everything I need. Do you think you can find me a better set?
%c[ui_8]I need an %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8]. I'm not sure where you can get one of these, but if you can find one, I need it.
Whoa! You found a nice set of tools for me. Here, I promised you some money in return.
Take the electronic devices from the stash and bring them to Nitro
Go to the specified location, take the electronics left in the stash, and bring them to Nitro.

%c[ui_8]I love tinkering with all kinds of equipment and taking apart the electronics that the guys bring from their raids. But sometimes they just leave what they find in a safe place and send the coordinates if it's not on their way. Can you go and grab it and bring it back? Don't worry, you'll be rewarded for the effort.
Great! Here, take it, just as I promised.
